overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban plaza, ascending to an elevated walkway with views of towering skyscrapers and neon billboards, then descending back to street level among pedestrians. The scene features a mix of natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting in a dense cyberpunk city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with neon signage and concrete planters

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past a green sports car and concrete planters, then climbing the stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: futuristic green sports car parked near the stairs
large rectangular concrete planter with bushes
red neon sign for Lizzie's Bar glowing against the building
steam rising from ground vents in the plaza
wide concrete stairs leading up to the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban plaza with a futuristic green sports car parked to the left. The player walks forward past concrete planters and outdoor seating, with steam rising from vents ahead. A red neon bar sign glows in the distance as the player approaches and begins ascending the concrete stairs to the upper walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: emerges from covered plaza onto sunlit elevated walkway with open sky views
turns right along the elevated walkway to follow the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway observing the towering skyscrapers and digital billboards in the distance

entered.detail: teal-colored metal safety railing along the walkway edge
large digital screen displaying Watson Whore advertisement
towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades and neon accents
orange fabric canopy structure attached to the building

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the sunlit elevated walkway, the scene opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards against a bright sky. The player walks along the teal-railed pathway, passing a purple vending machine and turning right to follow the walkway as it curves around the building. The Watson Whore billboard dominates the view ahead, with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway transition with stair descent

events.description: NPC pedestrians come into view standing and walking on the elevated walkway
begins descending the concrete ramp and stairs back to street level

agents.ego_description: walking past other pedestrians on the elevated walkway then descending the stairs to return to street level

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera on the elevated walkway

entered.detail: concrete ramp and stairs leading down to street level with teal railings
building with distinctive red window frames and teal structural elements

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the player encounters other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The environment becomes more enclosed as the player approaches a stair ramp descending between buildings with distinctive red and teal facades. The player begins the descent back to street level, leaving the panoramic city views behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street canyon with pedestrian traffic

events.description: reaches street level and enters an area with moderate pedestrian traffic
navigates through oncoming pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowd of pedestrians at street level between tall buildings in the urban canyon

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white cap and dark shirt walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking along the street in various outfits

entered.detail: short black metal bollards lining the sidewalk edge
stack of cardboard boxes and debris on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having descended to street level, the player enters a narrow urban canyon with tall buildings blocking most of the sky. The sidewalk is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in both directions. The player navigates through the crowd, passing street bollards and cardboard boxes, with the massive glass skyscrapers towering overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban plaza up to a sunlit elevated walkway and back down into a dense city canyon. It begins in a semi-covered plaza, moving past a green sports car and rising steam toward a glowing red neon bar sign before ascending a set of concrete stairs. As the camera emerges onto the upper level, the environment opens into a bright, panoramic vista of towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards, following a teal-railed path that curves past a purple vending machine. The scene then shifts as the walkway becomes more enclosed, leading the camera past oncoming pedestrians and down a ramp between red and teal facades. Finally, the view narrows as the camera descends back to street level, navigating through a crowded sidewalk of pedestrians and urban debris beneath the looming shadows of the overhead skyscrapers.
